If the claimant works or worked at home occasionally or full time, enter the postcode of where they travel into work or where they would have travelled to. If they're claimant against a respondent that they've not worked for - as best as you can, enter the postcode of where the respondent is based If your respondent's work location is outside the UK, complete this [ET1 claim form](https://www.claim-employment-tribunals.service.gov.uk).
This service is only available to solicitors representing single claimants, for a limited number of claims within our early adopter sites; Leeds, Glasgow, Bristol and Nottingham.

The postcode you entered is not included under the early adopter sites yet. Until your submitted location is supported, complete this [ET1 claim form](https://www.claim-employment-tribunals.service.gov.uk).
This service is only available to solicitors representing single claimants, for a limited number of claims within our four early adopter sites; Leeds, Glasgow, Bristol and Nottingham who meet the current reform criteria.
